description: Demo scope is limited to JSON shipment requests only

Production deployment, direct InfoAXS updates, customer authentication, pricing calculation, dangerous goods regulatory approval, and personally identifiable production data are excluded from the demo
The agent must never change a shipment automatically without a defined rule
Uncertain cases must be routed for human review
The agent must be stateless and exposed through an API
Deterministic validation rules must remain separate from probabilistic AI recommendations
No real customer or shipment data may be used in the demo
Every requirement must map to at least one test case
